name: San Antonio Seafood Cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Pace sauce and ketchup in a bowl.
2. Add a squeeze of fresh lemon juice to taste.
3. Stir until well mixed.
4. Transfer the mixture to a serving bowl.
5. Chill the bowl in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
6. To serve, place the bowl on a leaf lettuce-lined platter.
7. Surround with cooked and chilled shrimp, scallops, or crab meat (real or imitation), or a combination of all three.
8. Serve with cocktail picks.
